get_config_message: 📥 Config file will be delivered shortly
card_payment_exact_amount_notice: ⚠️ Important: transfer EXACTLY {{amount}} (down to the last rial) so the payment can be auto-verified instantly. Transferring a different amount will require manual admin review.
panel_on_hold_message: ⏳ Your subscription is being prepared for connection
create_sublink_no_active_subscription: ❌ You don't have an active subscription yet. Please purchase a plan first.
sublink_provisioning_failed: ⚠️ Failed to create the sub-link. Please try again later or contact support.
receipt_upload_prompt: 📸 Upload receipt photo (screenshot of successful transfer)
receipt_submitted: ✅ Receipt submitted for review. You will be notified once verified.
receipt_submitted_auto_or_review: ✅ Receipt received! If the transferred amount matches exactly, your subscription will be confirmed automatically within minutes. Otherwise, an admin will review it manually.
receipt_missing_session: ⚠️ We couldn't find your pending payment details. Please start the purchase again from the menu.
error_generic_request: Error: Could not process your request
error_insufficient_quota: ⚠️ Requested quota exceeds the allowed limit. Please choose a smaller amount.
error_subscription_expired: ⏰ Your subscription has expired. Please renew to continue.
error_subscription_suspended: 🚫 Your subscription has been suspended. Please contact support.
error_subscription_not_active: ❌ You don't have an active subscription. Please purchase a plan first.
error_max_sublinks_reached: 🔒 You've reached the maximum number of links allowed for this plan.
error_insufficient_balance: 💰 Insufficient balance. Please top up your wallet.
error_shared_payment_not_pending: 💳 This subscription isn't in a pending shared-payment state.
error_unknown: ❌ Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.
admin_broadcast_enter_text: 📢 Send the message text to broadcast to: {{targetRole}}
admin_receipt_action_failed: ⚠️ Could not process receipt {{receiptId}}. Check logs.
force_subscribe.prompt: 🔒 To use the bot, please join the following channel(s) first:
force_subscribe.still_not_joined: ❌ You haven't joined all required channels yet.
reseller_menu_title:
🤝 Reseller Program

Choose a tier to apply for:
reseller_no_tiers: No reseller tiers are currently available.
reseller_tier_not_found: ❌ This reseller tier is no longer available.
reseller_application_auto_approved: ✅ You're now a reseller on the {{tier}} tier!
reseller_application_submitted: 📨 Your application for the {{tier}} tier has been submitted and is pending admin approval.
reseller_insufficient_balance: 💰 Insufficient balance to pay the application fee ({{fee}}). Your balance: {{balance}}. Please top up your wallet first.
